title: Planet Suzaku
content:
Planet Zhuque
 or Vermillion Bird Planet is the name of the planet where 
Wang Lin
 was born. There were only four Ascendant cultivators on Zhuque. Two of them were at the early stage, one was at the mid stage, and the last one, the one who inherited the name Zhuque, was at the late stage.

Contents

1

Past Structure

1.1

Zhuque Continent

1.2

Kong Continent

2

Current Structure

3

Background

4

History

5

Zhuque Title Owners

6

Countries List

7

9 Great Sects -Zhuque Planet

Past Structure
[
]

There are six continents on the planet with Zhuque continent being the largest and seat of 
Mount Zhuque
's power.

Zhuque Continent
[
]

The continent of Zhuque is the largest continent on the planet. The sole Rank 6 country Zhuque is also located on this continent.

The continent contains the three Rank 5 countries on the planet: Green Dragon, Thousand Fantasy, and Pilu.

The country of Zhuque covers 2/3 of the continent's land, while the other three Rank 5 countries share the remaining 1/3 land.

There are three sects located in the country of Zhuque: Heavenly Jade Sect, the Earth Soul Sect, and the Immortal’s Path Sect.

Each of the three sects had one 
Ascendant
 cultivator. In addition to the late-stage Ascendant cultivator at Mount Zhuque, they were the main battle force of Planet Zhuque.

The country of Pilu housed the 
Soul Refining Sect
 which was strong enough to rival Mount Zhuque despite the lack of Ascendant cultivators. This was due to the Sect Master storing the battle souls of the sect masters of previous generations inside the Billion-Soul Soul Flag.

The country of Zhuque is the capital , the bird, and the title of the leader of the country. It's Former name, before the planet, was gifted was Planet Fu Wen.

Kong Continent
[
]

It is one weakest among the six main continents of Planet Zhuque. There were countless cultivation countries inside Kong continent but most of them were Rank 1 or Rank 2 countries with some Rank 3 countries and even fewer Rank 4 countries. After all, the resources on this continent were too poor. The country of 
Zhao
 was at the very edge of the Kong continent. It was one of the smaller Rank 3 countries. In fact, it was only half the size of 
Hou Fen
. 
Xue Yue
 is another Rank 4 cultivation country. They are at the northern border of the continent.

Current Structure
[
]

After Wang Lin rose to fame as the "Lord of the Sealed Realm" following the Third Sealed-Outer Realm War, cultivators across the entire 
Sealed Realm
 rushed to Zhuque to pay their respects to Wang Lin. These cultivators also remodeled the planet into a Holy Land of the entire Sealed Realm. Although this made the planet seem like paradise, all the locations that Wang Lin remembered from the past were now gone. Fortunately, Zhou Wutai petitioned the cultivators to not change anything inside the country of Zhao. Moreover, the country of Zhao has been sealed by a formation that restricts any foreign cultivator from entering inside.

There is a formation laid across the entire planet with stipulations that the visitors to the planet may not cause any nuisance or stay inside the planet for more than three days.

Currently, there are only nine sects across the entire planet as all the sects of the past have either been destroyed or assimilated by them. The 
Cloud Sky Sect
 is one of these nine sects.

Background
[
]

Forsaken Immortal Clan
 members were the natives of the planet. However, after Zhuque became a rank 6 cultivation country, they were gifted this planet by the 
Cultivation Alliance
. This resulted in a large, bloody and drawn-out war between the cultivators and the Forsaken Immortal Clan. The war ravaged the originally lively planet and turned it into a half-wasted planet.

History
[
]

Many years after the war, under the rule of 
Zhu Quezi
, Planet Zhuque had become stagnant due to the country of Zhuque suppressing any Rank 5 country that even came close to attaining Rank 6. This inner conflict resulted in a cold war between Mount Zhuque and the other Rank 5 countries.

This finally resulted in war as Mount Zhuque waged war against the Soul Refining Sect and Giant Demon Clan and the three Rank 5 countries. In the midst of the war, the survivors of the Forsaken Immortal Clan led by 
Yun Quezi
 who had been biding his time for centuries also launched a war against Mount Zhuque.

Mount Zhuque, Holy Land of Zhuque, Title of Zhuque.

It originally belongs to the faction of the Four Divine Sect as its status is like a distant branch of the Four Divine Sect. The first generation Zhuque was rumored to have come from the Four Divine Planet.

Planet Zhuque is one of the Four Ancestral Planet of the Four Divine Sect, the Vermillion Bird Sect. It's said to have one Ancestral Planet for each Four Sect and Star System. The Four Ancestral Planet are the Gate to the Outer Realm and Inner Realm.

Zhuque Title Owners
[
]

1st 
Ye Wuyou

2nd 
Situ Nan

13th 
Qian Pinghai
 (body sold to the 
Corpse Sect
)

14th 
Zhu Quezi

15th 
Zhou Wutai
